title: rapicactus × anomalus
side_effects: Rapicactus × anomalus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. In severe cases, prolonged use can lead to more serious complications like kidney damage, respiratory failure, and even coma. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing conditions, such as liver disease or cardiovascular issues, may experience exacerbated symptoms when exposed to the plant's volatile compounds. It is essential to handle and use Rapicactus × anomalus with extreme caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
